name: Sherry Turkey Tetrazzini
recipeIngredient: 10.25 oz Cream of mushroom soup can
10.75 oz Cream of chicken soup can
6 Servings cooked spaghetti or pasta of your choice
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil and cook the turkey.
2. Drain the VEG-ALL; reserve the liquid and combine it with the soups, milk, and wine.
3. Add the soup mixture to the spaghetti and mix in the turkey, vegetables, mushrooms, and 3/4 cup Parmesan cheese.
4. Sprinkle the remaining Parmesan cheese on top.
5. Bake at 400°F for 30 minutes.
